prompt: A minimalist vintage poster in a vertical 9:16 composition on an off-white paper-textured background. Center a single male figure in side-profile facing right, shown from hat to upper thighs, styled like a 1940s noir intellectual wearing a dark fedora with a light hatband, a black suit jacket, white dress shirt, and dark tie. Use dramatic high-contrast Rembrandt lighting and deep shadows so the face is mostly obscured in black silhouette, with a refined film noir mood. Place 1 large vivid red circle directly behind the head and upper shoulders like a bold halo, perfectly clean and graphic. The lower half of the torso and jacket should dissolve into long vertical black ink drips and splatters, with some gray wash streaks mixed in, creating a melting ink effect that extends downward toward the bottom of the poster. Keep the palette restricted to true red, deep black, gray wash, and off-white. Add 1 bold uppercase sans-serif title centered near the bottom reading THE MID-CENTURY INTELLECTUAL. Overall style: mid-century modern poster design, cinematic noir, minimalist editorial art, clean negative space, elegant, haunting, graphic, museum-poster quality.
